titleStmt.title: SII 26.303: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 303. (A.R. No. 288 of 1909.) TIRUKKACHCHŪR, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

p.hi: Tribhº Kulōttuṅga-chōḷadēva III: Year 3, Āvaṇi 3 = 1180-81 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift of two sandhi lamps to the temple of the same deity in the same Tirukkachchūr as occurring in No. 302 above, by a certain Puduppākkiḻān-Ādan of Uḻalūr alias Rājarājanallūr in Kaḷattūr-nāḍu in Kaḷattūr-kōṭṭam. It is stated that the donor entrusted 4 paḻaṅkāśu to provide for the lamps with the Śivabrāhmaṇa Sṛishṭīśvaramuḍaiyān Iṟaṇindān alias Tillaināyaka-bhaṭṭan of Kāśyapa-[gōtra] belonging to Kānaṟaikuḍi, who had right of worship in the temple and who had agreed to carry out the object of the gift hereditarily.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhvunaccakravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu mūṉṟāvatu Āvaṇi māsappiṟan=ta muṉṟāntiyatināḷ jayaṅko
ṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu kaḷattūrkoṭṭattuc ceṅkuṉṟanāṭṭut tirukkaccūr tiru vālakkoyiluṭaiyārkku Ikkoṭṭattu kaḷattūr nāṭ
ṭu Uḻalūrāṉa rājarājanallūrilirukkum putuppākkiḻānātanen vaitta can=tiviḷakkiraṇṭukku Iṭṭa paḻaṅkācu 4 Ikkācu nālum Ikko
yiṟkāṇi Uṭaiya civabrāhmaṇan kāśyapa gotrattu kānaṟaikuṭi sraṣṭiśvaramuṭaiyāniṟaṇindānāna tillaināyaka bhaṭṭanen I
ppaḻaṅkācu nāluṅkaik koṇṭu Iccan=tiviḷakkiraṇṭum cantrādittavaṟ celuttakkaṭavomāka sammatittom nānumen vaṅśattāru
m Itu panamaāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 26.303 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
